sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n343" key="a)ga/nwtos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἀγάνωτος</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, (<etym lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="etym">γᾰνόω</etym>) <sense id="n343.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">not enamelled</tr_> or <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">lacquered,</tr_> Posidon.Medic. ap.<bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0715.tlg001:7:20" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Paul.Aeg.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">7.20</biblScope></bibl>, Zos.Alch.<bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0715.tlg001:p.220B" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">p.220B.</biblScope> </bibl> </sense> </entryFree>
